name: Codex
notes: This repository's dogfooding workspace opts the local Codex adapter into exec mode for the narrow T-002 pilot; generated scaffolds should still stay manual by default.
On this Windows machine the repo-local dogfooding profile uses `cmd.exe /d /s /c codex ...` because direct PowerShell invocation of the local shim is blocked by script-execution policy.
On the locally observed Codex CLI surface from 2026-04-08, `codex exec` accepted `--sandbox` but rejected `--ask-for-approval`, so this dogfooding profile keeps the narrower confirmed flag shape.
This repo-local dogfooding profile also allowlists OPENAI_API_KEY so the executor can forward the already-configured local auth env var to the child Codex process.
Keep this profile narrow and local-only until the real run path is proven stable through task-local evidence.
